Class Tower

java.lang.Object
tower.Tower
Direct Known Subclasses:
AOETower, GlacierTower, IceTower, RangeTower, SuperconductTower, TeslaTower, ZapTower
public abstract class Tower extends Object
Represents the skeletal implementation of a defensive structure within the game. * The Tower class defines the core attributes and behaviors for all tower types, including target acquisition, cooldown management, and status effect handling (e.g., stunning). It employs a template-like structure where the update logic is standardized, but the specific shooting mechanism is deferred to subclasses.

  • Constructor Details

    • Tower

      public Tower(double x, double y, double range, double cooldown, int damage)
      Constructs a Tower with fundamental combat statistics.
      Parameters:
      x - The horizontal position.
      y - The vertical position.
      range - The detection radius.
      cooldown - The shooting frequency.
      damage - The attack power.

  • Method Details

    • update

      public void update(double deltaTime, List<Enemy> enemies, List<Bullet> bullets)
      Updates the tower's state during each game tick. * This method handles: 1. Stun Recovery: Decrements the stun timer and restores functionality when expired. 2. Cooldown Management: Accumulates deltaTime to determine if the tower can fire. 3. Target Acquisition: Invokes findTarget(java.util.List<enemy.Enemy>) to locate valid enemies. 4. Attack Execution: Triggers the shoot(enemy.Enemy, java.util.List<bullets.Bullet>) method for identified targets.
      Parameters:
      deltaTime - The time elapsed since the last update.
      enemies - The list of currently active enemies.
      bullets - The global list of projectiles to append new shots to.

    • findTarget

      protected List<Enemy> findTarget(List<Enemy> enemies)
      Logic for selecting the most appropriate enemy to attack. * The current implementation prioritizes the enemy that is: 1. Alive and not a FlyingEnemy. 2. Within the tower's range. 3. Furthest along the path (highest Waypoint index). 4. Closest to their next objective in case of a tie in index.
      Parameters:
      enemies - The list of potential targets.
      Returns:
      A list containing the optimal target(s).

    • notInRange

      protected boolean notInRange(Enemy e)
      Calculates the Euclidean distance to determine if an enemy is outside the attack radius.
      Parameters:
      e - The enemy to check.
      Returns:
      true if the enemy is beyond the engagement range.

    • stun

      public void stun(double duration)
      Disables the tower for a specified duration.
      Parameters:
      duration - Time in seconds the tower remains inactive.

    • shoot

      protected abstract void shoot(Enemy target, List<Bullet> bullets)
      Abstract method to be implemented by subclasses to define projectile behavior.
      Parameters:
      target - The enemy to engage.
      bullets - The list to add new projectiles to.

    • getX

      public double getX()
      Returns:
      The x-coordinate of the tower.

    • getY

      public double getY()
      Returns:
      The y-coordinate of the tower.

    • getRange

      public double getRange()
      Returns:
      The attack range in pixels of this tower.

      public int getBulletDamage()
      Returns:
      The bullet damage of this tower

    • getBulletSpeed

      public double getBulletSpeed()
      Returns:
      The speed of the bullet of this tower.

    • setBulletSpeed

      public void setBulletSpeed(double bulletSpeed)
      Parameters:
      bulletSpeed - Sets the new speed value of this tower's projectiles.

    • getCooldown

      public double getCooldown()
      Returns:
      The cooldown duration between attacks.

    • setPosition

      public void setPosition(double x, double y)
      Updates the tower's location on the game map.
      Parameters:
      x - The new horizontal coordinate.
      y - The new vertical coordinate.

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns:
      The name of the tower.

    • getImagePath

      public String getImagePath()
      Returns:
      The resource path string of the tower's sprite image.

    • setImagePath

      public void setImagePath(String path)
      Parameters:
      path - Sets a new image path for the tower's visual representation.

    • getPlaceSoundPath

      public String getPlaceSoundPath()
      Returns:
      The file path to the sound effect played upon placement.

    • getPosition

      public javafx.geometry.Point2D getPosition()
      Returns:
      Point2D Returns the tower's location as a 2D point object.
